posts.text: Profit more than sales. Some exceptional items or are the numbers correct? image 748×295 19.1 KB Edit: (AI Summary) The Profit After Tax (PAT) is greater than the Total Income in Q4 FY2026 due to a massive, non-operating accounting credit related to deferred taxes. Here is the financial breakdown for Q4 FY2026: Metric Amount (₹ mn) Total Income 3,535 Profit Before Tax (PBT) 692 Tax Expense (Credit) 3,302 Profit After Tax (PAT) 3,994 The net profit was artificially inflated beyond sales volume by two distinct accounting adjustments: Deferred Tax Asset Creation: The company recognized a deferred…

posts.text: I’ve found this post very insightful and practical in terms of expectations.. Do read.. open.substack.com The Curious Case of SAMHI Hotels Once the darling of Indian Fintwit.
